body:
sapphic-dice:

flyingturtle776:

sapphic-dice:

I got catcalled… but I didn’t even really notice what was happening until one of the other guys in the car of guys, as they were driving away, shouted at his friend to “STOP CATCALLING HER!”

So like, ew, but nice of that dude to tell off his friend I guess, and weirdly euphoric. Also gendered correctly lol… I guess that part makes sense at least with the catcalling.

Anyways I’m gonna eat spring rolls now.

Om nom.

Being transfem is weird because I’m both jealous and want to rip that guy’s throat out

Trust… the feeling is mutual.

I remember the first time I got catcalled. I kept thinking, “Do not smile. Do not let them know how euphoric this is. Do not encourage bad behavior…”</
